mapper.sql: id, user_id, conversation_id, conversation_type, unread_count, last_read_seq, is_top, is_mute, show_nickname, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM im_user_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_top = 1 AND status = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM im_user_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(unread_count), 0) FROM im_user_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
SELECT conversation_id FROM im_user_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1

SELECT uc.*, c.conversation_key as conv_key, c.conversation_type as conv_type, c.conversation_name as conv_name, c.conversation_avatar as conv_avatar, c.last_message_id, c.last_message_time, c.last_message_content, c.last_message_sender, c.last_message_seq FROM im_user_conversation uc LEFT JOIN im_conversation c ON uc.conversation_id = c.id AND c.status = 1 WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 1 ORDER BY uc.update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM im_user_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND status = 1

SELECT uc.*, c.conversation_name, c.conversation_avatar FROM im_user_conversation uc LEFT JOIN im_conversation c ON uc.conversation_id = c.id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 1 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY uc.update_time DESC
